atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports falling and experiencing chest pain and shortness of breath.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports falling outside, resulting in ankle swelling and chest pain.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: He initially dismissed the chest pain but developed shortness of breath.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: He reports inconsistent medication adherence, taking bumex sporadically and occasionally missing doses.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: He admits to struggling with dietary adherence, frequently consuming salty foods and snacks, including chips and pizza.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: He has been attempting to quit smoking, having stopped approximately two years ago, with only one cigarette smoked per week recently.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: He denies sleep disturbances and chest pain beyond the recent episode.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Physical examination reveals blood pressure of 128/72 mmHg.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Vital signs are stable.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Neck examination is unremarkable, with no jugular venous distension.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Lung auscultation is clear bilaterally.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: A grade 2 systolic ejection murmur is heard.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Lower extremities demonstrate trace edema.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Echocardiogram demonstrates a preserved ejection fraction of 55% and mild to moderate mitral regurgitation.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports symptoms consistent with congestive heart failure

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Clinician suspects uncontrolled hypertension exacerbated the patient's symptoms

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports dietary indiscretion

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Mild mitral regurgitation is present

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Clinician prescribes bumex 2 mg daily

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Clinician prescribes cozaar 100 mg daily

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Clinician prescribes norvasc 5 mg daily

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Clinician orders a renal artery ultrasound

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Clinician refers to nutrition for dietary counseling

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Clinician instructs the patient to weigh themselves daily

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Clinician instructs the patient to report weight gain exceeding 3 pounds in two days

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Clinician schedules a follow-up appointment in four weeks
